output.code: import json, re, os, textwrap, unicodedata, math, itertools, sys, statistics

# Load the provided files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

len(quran), len(hadith)

# Inspect sample hadith entry keys
hadith[0].keys(), hadith[0]

target_full = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
# Direct search
matches_exact = [v for v in quran if target_full in v['ayah_text']]
len(matches_exact), matches_exact[:3]

# Define diacritic remover
arabic_diacritics = ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x0610, 0x061A+1)) + ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x064B, 0x065F+1)) + ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x0670, 0x0670+1)) + ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x06D6, 0x06ED+1))
diacritic_re = re.compile('[%s]' % re.escape(arabic_diacritics))

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return None
    s = diacritic_re.sub('', s)
    s = s.replace('ـ','')  # tatweel
    s = s.replace('إ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]', ' ', s)  # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

target_norm = normalize_ar(target_full)
target_norm

# Search quran normalized contains
quran_norm_texts = [normalize_ar(v['ayah_text']) for v in quran]
candidates_containing = [(i, v, quran[i]['ayah_text']) for i, v in enumerate(quran_norm_texts) if target_norm in v]
len(candidates_containing)

phrase_norm = normalize_ar("فعل الشكر")
[(i, quran[i]['ayah_text']) for i,v in enumerate(quran_norm_texts) if "فعل الشكر" in v][:10]

# Find ayat containing the word "الشكر" (normalized)
occurs_shukr = [(i, quran[i]['surah_name'], quran[i]['ayah_id'], quran[i]['ayah_text']) 
                for i,v in enumerate(quran_norm_texts) if "الشكر" in v or "الشكر" in quran[i]['ayah_text']]
len(occurs_shukr), occurs_shukr[:10]

occurs_shukr = [(i, quran[i]['surah_name'], quran[i]['ayah_id'], quran[i]['ayah_text']) 
                for i,v in enumerate(quran_norm_texts) if "شكر" in v]
len(occurs_shukr), occurs_shukr[:10]

hadith_norm_texts = []
for i,h in enumerate(hadith):
    # Combine 'hadithTxt' and 'Matn' if Matn not None
    text = h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    hadith_norm_texts.append(normalize_ar(text))

target_norm, target_full

# Search exact full in hadith text first
hadith_exact = []
for i,h in enumerate(hadith):
    text = h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    if target_full in text:
        hadith_exact.append((i,h['title'] if 'title' in h else None, text[:200]))
len(hadith_exact), hadith_exact[:1]

# Search normalized occurrence
hadith_containing = [(i, hadith[i].get('title'), (hadith[i].get('Matn') or hadith[i].get('hadithTxt'))[:180]) 
                     for i,v in enumerate(hadith_norm_texts) if target_norm in v]
len(hadith_containing), hadith_containing[:3]

hadith_with_fi3l_al_shukr = [(i, hadith[i].get('title'), (hadith[i].get('Matn') or hadith[i].get('hadithTxt'))[:200]) 
                             for i,v in enumerate(hadith_norm_texts) if "فعل الشكر" in v]
len(hadith_with_fi3l_al_shukr), hadith_with_fi3l_al_shukr[:5]

hadith_with_shukr = [(i, hadith[i].get('title'), (hadith[i].get('Matn') or hadith[i].get('hadithTxt'))[:200]) 
                             for i,v in enumerate(hadith_norm_texts) if "شكر" in v]
len(hadith_with_shukr)
